title: Yellow Card & Red Card Emoji 🟨🟥 Copy & Paste
meta_description: Copy and paste the yellow card 🟨 and red card 🟥 emoji for soccer, plus referee, VAR, and booking combos. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The soccer card emojis — yellow 🟨, red 🟥, and referee combos for bookings and send-offs. Click any emoji to copy it.
intro: There is no literal referee-card emoji, so fans use the yellow square 🟨 and red square 🟥 as the booking and the send-off. This page gathers those cards alongside the referee, VAR, and match-official emojis, plus reaction combos for a controversial decision. Click any emoji to copy it.
